ksa_text: Perform database administration and routine maintenance tasks, including schema optimization, patching, index management, storage allocation, performance tuning, and end-of-life planning for database systems.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop risk mitigation strategies and cybersecurity countermeasures to address cost, performance, and security risks and to resolve vulnerabilities and recommend security changes to system or system components as needed.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Develop risk mitigation strategies and cybersecurity countermeasures to address cost, performance, and security risks and to resolve vulnerabilities and recommend security changes to system or system components as needed.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-009 (DA, Task) maps to Data Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4408 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: onet=0.441, nice=0.422, dcwf=0.414. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4408 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-T-009 (DA, composite 0.4408) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles does not surface this DA-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4408 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DA domain content at composite 0.4408 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4408, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
